problem_statement: Even a solid AI generation flow will be ignored if it is hidden behind an obscure route or looks like a separate product mode. The feature needs clear entry points that feel native to pantry planning rather than bolted onto the side of the app.
in_scope: Add a primary entry point in the Plan recipes panel for generating pantry-aware drafts
Optionally surface a secondary entry point on Home where cook ideas already exist
Add concise explanatory copy so users understand that suggestions come from current pantry stock
requirements: The primary entry point must live inside an existing high-intent recipe or planning surface
The trigger label must communicate pantry-aware generation rather than generic AI text
Entry points must preserve the current lightweight navigation model
acceptance_criteria: A user can discover and trigger AI recipe generation from the existing app flow without hunting through settings
The entry point language makes pantry context explicit
Adding the trigger does not require a new top-level navigation destination
dependencies: P2-ai-03 AI recipe draft review surface
risks: If the trigger is too prominent before quality is proven it may create distrust from weak early drafts
If the trigger is too subtle the feature will be effectively hidden
implementation_notes: Start in src/app/(app)/plan/page.tsx near the recipes panel. Consider a small secondary prompt in Home only after the in-flow recipe entry point is stable.
